    private static void encodeHex5(
            final byte[] data,
            final int dataOffset,
            final int dataLen,
            final char[] toDigits,
            final char[] out,
            final int outOffset) {
        for (int i = dataOffset, j = outOffset; i < dataOffset + dataLen; i++) {
            out[j++] = toDigits[(0xF0 & data[i]) >>> 4];
            out[j++] = toDigits[0x0F & data[i]];
        }
    }
```
